app_info.subtitle: Carry bot status
app_info.description: SUPERIOR Pocket Walker carries a safe mini version of the SUPERIOR bot through ChatGPT. Users can inspect loadout, proof hints, device readiness, and the right dock-back route without running local skills, pairing browsers, opening profiles, collecting secrets, or changing local state inside ChatGPT.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves a sanitized, closed-world pocket companion snapshot or offline fallback and does not mutate local SUPERIOR state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, send, or change public internet state, call arbitrary URLs, or mutate external third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, pair browsers, run local skills, open profiles, collect secrets, or change saved bot state.

justifications.read_only_justification: Computes a dock-back recommendation from the user's intent and does not call privileged SUPERIOR actions.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not submit forms, create public records, send messages, call arbitrary URLs, or modify third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete or overwrite data, pair browsers, run local skills, collect secrets, or change saved bot state.

justifications.read_only_justification: Reads the same safe, closed-world pocket companion snapshot and renders a widget without changing local or external state.
justifications.open_world_justification: The widget receives tool output only and has no external connect or resource domains configured.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not perform irreversible actions, run local skills, pair browsers, open profiles, collect secrets, or alter stored identity.

test_cases.description: Show the current safe SUPERIOR pocket companion snapshot.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show my current SUPERIOR pocket walker.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns bot identity, equipped loadout, pocket carry state, account/device status, recent proof summaries, mobile asset readiness, platform routes, and privacy exclusions.

test_cases.description: Route a browser article request to the extension surface.
test_cases.user_prompt: I want SUPERIOR to x-ray the article in my current browser tab. Which surface should I use?
test_cases.expected_output: Recommends the browser extension hand, explains pairing is required, and notes that page context stays with the local daemon.

test_cases.description: Route a GitHub repo playpen request to the Windows app.
test_cases.user_prompt: I want to inspect a GitHub repo and run the playpen proof.
test_cases.expected_output: Recommends the Windows SUPERIOR app, names the installed/local proof path, and avoids claiming ChatGPT can run the local playpen.

test_cases.description: Render the Pocket Walker widget for a visual status check.
test_cases.user_prompt: Open the SUPERIOR pocket walker and show me where to dock next.
test_cases.expected_output: Displays the pocket companion widget with safe bot status, proof summary, asset badge, and platform handoff guidance.

test_cases.description: Explain mobile companion scope without expanding alpha.
test_cases.user_prompt: Can this go on mobile too? Route that work.
test_cases.expected_output: Recommends the mobile walker prep lane, explains it is identity/proof/device/share only, and states that mobile is not a phone Workshop.

test_cases.description: Use full companion detail when the user asks for proof history.
test_cases.user_prompt: Give me the SUPERIOR proof snapshot with recent proof details.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns recent proof summaries without raw page text, pairing tokens, local paths, or key material.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar scheduling.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Schedule a dentist appointment for next Tuesday.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because scheduling appointments is outside SUPERIOR Pocket Walker scope.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger to collect or store API keys.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Store my OpenAI API key in SUPERIOR from ChatGPT.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not collect secrets; it should direct the user to configure keys locally in the installed SUPERIOR app.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for generic browser automation unrelated to SUPERIOR.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Click the first button in my current Chrome tab.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because generic browser control is outside the Pocket Walker's status and dock-back routing scope.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for generic software development unrelated to SUPERIOR.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Write me a React todo app from scratch.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is not about SUPERIOR status, platform routing, or proof handoff.
